title: Stackable Storage Cart with 36'' Legs
features: Looking for an easy way to both store and transport your tables and chairs?
Look no further than our Stackable Table and Chair Storage Cart!
This solid and dependable cart boasts a 1500 pound load capacity for both moving and storing stacks of tables and chairs.
These carts can also be stacked up to 3 high to save floor space!
This stackable cart features 2 sets of fork pockets, 5? swivel casters and 33" legs.
And to make things even easier, the legs are removable so that tables and chairs can be loaded and unloaded in a snap!
Each cart can hold 36 resin folding chairs, 75 plastic folding chairs and 15 wood folding tables.
